title: Bestial Hide
description: The character's skin becomes toughened with layers of thick scales or chitin.

title: Unnatural Arms
description: Twisted appendages (shrivelled arms, hooked talons, or fleshy tendrils) emerge from this character's spine or torso.

title: Sightless Orbs
description: This character's eyes become sightless, cracked windows into a soul afflicted with a growing corruption.
effect: Gains the Blind and Unnatural Senses (CBx10) traits.

title: Swollen Brute
description: This character becomes bloated, his muscles expanding and his form becoming excessively corpulent or disturbingly muscular (or perhaps both).
effect: Toughness and Strength permanently increased by 10, but Agility bonus is reduced by 1 for purposes of movement.

title: Deathsight
description: This character's mind becomes twisted, his eyes showing him countless possible annihilations of anything or anyone he gazes upon for more than a few moments.
effect: Once per game session, may increase the damage of one attack by his Corruption bonus. If he does so, he gains 1 Corruption point.

title: Cursed Fleshmetal
description: This character's armour and cybernetic implants become fused with his flesh, and even regenerate.
effect: Removing fused items requires a Challenging (+0) Medicae test; failure inflicts 1d5 Rending damage to a random limb (ignores Armour). Can make an Ordinary (+10) Toughness test to repair merged items as Tech-Use, but suffers 1 Corruption point.

title: Razor Fangs
description: This character's teeth grow long, turning into tearing fangs.
effect: Gains an unarmed attack: 1d5+CB Rending damage, Pen 2. Permanently reduces Fellowship by 1d5.

title: Excessive Legs
description: This character develops extra legs that support his form, suspending his upper torso above a centauroid lower body.
effect: Gains the Quadruped trait with a number of extra legs equal to half his Corruption bonus (rounded up).

title: Wings
description: Massive feathered or leathery wings erupt from this character's spine.

title: Serpentine Tail
description: This character's legs wither while his spine elongates into a serpentine tail that supports his body.
effect: Gains the Crawler trait and an unarmed attack: 1d10 Impact damage, Pen 0.

title: Searing Blood
description: This character's veins are filled with searing acids in place of blood, though somehow the corrosive effects do not burn his own flesh.
effect: Whenever he suffers Blood Loss, the foul liquid erupts and inflicts 1d5+CB Energy damage, Pen 0, to each other character within 1d5 metres.

title: Witch-Curse
description: A small stigma in the shape of a maddening rune appears on this character's body, marking him as touched by Chaos.
effect: Gains the Psyker trait (or adds 1 to an existing psy rating) and freely learns any 1 psychic power costing 100 xp or less. Whenever he uses this power, he gains 1d5 Corruption points.

title: Bone-Blades
description: This character's bones grow long, twisted spurs that sprout painfully from his flesh on his command.
effect: Gains an unarmed attack: 1d10+CB Rending damage, Pen 0. Whenever he attacks with this weapon, suffers Blood Loss unless he passes a Challenging (+0) Toughness test.

title: Cannibalistic Urge
description: Blood and marrow become as wine and bread to this character, and normal food no longer sates the hunger of his soul.
effect: Once per game session, can remove 1d5 damage by consuming human flesh. Each time he does so, gains 1 Corruption point.

title: Corrupted Flesh
description: Instead of blood, when this character's flesh is torn asunder, horrific insects, worms, or flitting creatures spill forth.
effect: Whenever he suffers damage, gains the Fear (1) trait for 1d5 rounds.

title: It Will Not Die!
description: This character is touched by the power of the Warp, and fortune twists to keep him alive regardless of the terrible wounds he suffers, as if it is the will of some dark being beyond the veil of reality.
effect: Can no longer burn a Fate point to survive lethal injuries. Whenever this character would die, he instead survives by the narrowest margin as if he had burned a Fate point and gains 1d10+5 Corruption points.

title: Warp Gaze
description: Whatever this character looks upon burns with the fire of the Warp, and all who see his eyes despair.
effect: Gains a 20m ranged attack: 1d10+CB Energy damage with the Spray quality. Each use gains 1d5 Corruption points. Characters struck must make a Challenging (+0) Fear (1) test.

title: Warp Regeneration
description: Corruption seethes through this character's flesh, sewing his body back together time and time again whether he wills it or not.
effect: Whenever this character suffers damage, makes a Challenging (+0) Toughness test. On success, gains the Regeneration (CB) trait for 1 round and gains 1d5 Corruption points.

title: The Warp Made Manifest
description: This character becomes a Daemon-like creature, capable of reshaping reality itself at his whim.
effect: Gains the Daemonic (CB), Fear (2), From Beyond, and Warp Instability traits. Can use Willpower in place of any other characteristic for any test.
